rationale: Educ. Code §38.202 establishes an advisory committee on epinephrine and respiratory distress medication in schools. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The commissioner of state health services shall establish an advisory committee to examine and review the administration, on a campus of a school district, an open-enrollment charter school, a private school, or an institution of higher education, of:
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and this school health advisory committee statute.
